tagline.en: The raspberries are here -- race to pick them!
tagline.da: Hindbaererne er her -- loeb om kap for at plukke dem!

theme.hero_task: Pick the first ripe raspberries from Bed B

tasks.action: Pick first ripe raspberries from Bed B

prompt.en: Gently pull the raspberry -- if it comes off easily, it's ripe! Don't squish!
prompt.da: Traek forsigtigt i hindbaeret -- hvis det slipper nemt, er det modent! Lad vaere med at mase!

tasks.action: Harvest tomatoes and cucumbers from Bed C

prompt.en: Daily Bed C round -- tomatoes, cucumbers, and check the pepper!
prompt.da: Daglig Bed C runde -- tomater, agurker, og tjek peberfrugten!

tasks.action: Water all beds (neighbor handles if on vacation)

prompt.en: If on vacation: neighbor waters. If home: your job! Check every bed.
prompt.da: Hvis paa ferie: naboen vander. Hvis hjemme: dit job! Tjek hvert bed.

tasks.action: Check broccoli heads forming in Bed E

prompt.en: Look for the tiny green tree forming in the middle -- that's the broccoli head!
prompt.da: Kig efter det lille groenne trae i midten -- det er broccolihovedet!

tasks.action: Harvest bush beans from Bed E

prompt.en: Pick beans every few days so the plant keeps making more!
prompt.da: Pluk boenner hver faa dage, saa planten bliver ved med at lave flere!

growth_events.event: Autumn Bliss raspberries beginning to ripen -- green turning pink then red

prompt.en: The raspberries are turning from green to pink to red! Only pick the dark red ones!
prompt.da: Hindbaererne skifter fra groen til lyseroed til roed! Pluk kun de moerke roede!

prompt.en: See the little green tree forming? That's the broccoli growing inside!
prompt.da: Ser du det lille groenne trae? Det er broccolien, der gror indeni!
